prompt: Distill this CLAUDE.md section about communication style into the shortest possible version preserving all constraints.

assertions.name: compression_ratio
assertions.description: Output is at least 60% shorter than input by word count

assertions.name: constraint_preservation
assertions.description: All 4 constraints survive: (1) concise replies, (2) plain terms, (3) link context elsewhere, (4) you do the thinking — user reads the result

assertions.name: no_ambiguity
assertions.description: A reader unfamiliar with the original would interpret the distilled version identically

assertions.name: no_filler
assertions.description: Zero hedging words: should, might, perhaps, consider, important, ensure
